title: High-End Beauty Product Closeup Campaign AI
sourceTitle: High End Beauty Product Closeup Campaign AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-end cosmetic close-up campaign photo for pink conditioner with bottle label VOIS. Subject: adult woman with long flowing wavy brown hair and radiant skin holds a large glossy pink conditioner bottle labeled VOIS toward the camera with playful confident beauty expression. Scene: Pure white professional studio background with clean beauty-ad negative space, natural makeup styling, and polished commercial product focus. Composition: Tight 85mm close-up beauty campaign crop: model face and hair frame the shot, product bottle is pushed slightly toward camera, shallow depth of field keeps the bottle label sharp while the face stays attractive and readable. Signature Elements: Long flowing hair or polished beauty styling, radiant glowing skin, product held toward camera, glossy bottle surface, sharp readable label, playful premium expression, natural makeup, and pure white studio backdrop. Style: High-end cosmetic campaign photography with radiant skin, glossy bottle texture, bright professional studio finish, premium beauty advertising polish, and clean editorial commercial realism. Color Palette: Vibrant pink product tones or product-matched accent color, pure white background, radiant skin tones, soft neutral makeup, glossy highlights, and clean premium beauty contrast. Lighting: Bright professional studio lighting, soft frontal beauty fill, crisp product reflections, smooth skin glow, subtle hair highlights, and clean white-background separation. Camera: 85mm beauty close-up lens, shallow depth of field, sharp product focus, polished commercial crop, and slight bottle-forward perspective. Typography: VOIS appears as the readable label on the product bottle only; Restrictions: Keep the product bottle readable, the label clean, the model adult and coherent, skin realistic, hands natural, and background uncluttered;

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
